mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName AS menuName, m.menuPrice AS menuPrice, c.menuCategory AS menuCategory FROM MENUS m JOIN MENUC c ON m.menuCategory_Id = c.menuCategory_Id WHERE c.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY m.menu_Id

SELECT m.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName AS menuName, m.menuPrice AS menuPrice, f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, u.usedCount AS usedCount, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, (u.usedCount * f.foodMaterialPrice) AS usedPrice FROM MENUS m JOIN USED u ON m.menu_Id = u.menu_Id JOIN FOODM f ON u.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE m.menu_Id = #{menuId} ORDER BY f.foodMaterialName ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT u.foodMaterial_Id, SUM(u.usedCount) * #{saleCount} AS requiredCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll FROM USED u JOIN FOODM f ON u.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE u.menu_Id = #{menuId} GROUP BY u.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialCountAll HAVING f.foodMaterialCountAll < requiredCount ) lack
mapper.update: UPDATE FOODM f JOIN ( SELECT foodMaterial_Id, SUM(usedCount) * #{saleCount} AS requiredCount FROM USED WHERE menu_Id = #{menuId} GROUP BY foodMaterial_Id ) u ON f.foodMaterial_Id = u.foodMaterial_Id SET f.foodMaterialCountAll = f.foodMaterialCountAll - u.requiredCount WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialCountAll >= u.requiredCount
